response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq involving TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) — directly matching the JD's AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent), TDD/craftsmanship mindset, cloud/Kubernetes exposure, and React experience. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or PostgreSQL mentions, but the breadth and depth of relevant experience make this a strong interview candidate.
strengths: 13+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js/React across multiple senior roles
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshop experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume despite it being part of the primary stack
Testing experience emphasizes Selenium and D-lang tooling; no explicit Vitest or Jest mention
Primary database experience is MongoDB; limited evidence of PostgreSQL/relational depth
